mapper.insert: insert into market_delivery(delivery_id, order_id, seller_user_id, delivery_type, delivery_content, status, delivered_at) values(#{deliveryId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{orderId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{sellerUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{deliveryType}, #{deliveryContent}, #{status}, #{deliveredAt})
mapper.select: select delivery_id, order_id, seller_user_id, delivery_type, delivery_content, status, delivered_at, create_time from market_delivery where order_id = #{orderId, jdbcType=BINARY} order by delivery_id asc
